examples: Although geographically linked, the two provinces have long fought for political ascendancy.
Compared with cows and sheep, the special chickens have ascendancy over them.
Europeans no longer worry about American ascendancy.
Founded in 1592, Trinity was for centuries a bastion of Protestant ascendancy in Ireland.
Middlesbrough were clearly in the ascendancy and should have made more of a four-versus-two break.
